dossier.personalStatement: I am drawn to law because I have repeatedly seen how institutional rules shape whether people can actually access stability, dignity, and meaningful relief.
dossier.resumeText: Legal Assistant, MDK Legal — legal files, document preparation, deadline tracking, client communication support.\nNotary Business Owner — scheduling, identity verification, document workflow, client-facing service operations.
dossier.transcriptNotes: Kent State associate degree completed 2023. Clark Atlanta University B.A. Political Science, Magna Cum Laude, completed 2024.
dossier.workSummary: Daily legal operations exposure, document handling, deadlines, discretion, and professionalism.
dossier.recommenderPlan: One academic recommender and one legal/professional recommender.
dossier.schoolNotes: Primary targets: Cleveland State, Capital, Dayton.
dossier.weakPoints: Highest LSAT 147. Statement needs concrete legal moments.
dossier.optionalEssayIdeas: Resilience, systems thinking, rights advocacy, legal professionalism.

schools.name: University of Dayton School of Law
